items.q: How do I register for courses?
items.a: Course registration is done online through the Student Portal (portal.greenfield.edu) under 'Course Registration'. It opens 2 weeks before semester start and closes 1 week after classes begin (late registration has a small fee).

items.q: What if a course I want is full?
items.a: You can join the waitlist on the portal. You'll be auto-enrolled if a seat opens, or you can email the faculty coordinator for an override request.

items.q: How do I drop or change a course?
items.a: Course changes are allowed within the first 2 weeks of the semester via the portal's 'Add/Drop' tab, with no penalty. After that, a Course Change Form needs faculty coordinator approval.
